title: Senior Doctor - Pfizer India Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Pfizer India Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Pfizer India Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pfizer India Digital Technologies:
Pfizer India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India Digital Technologies!
